title: Consultant note on PM productivity pressure
claim: PMs are spending increasing time synthesizing fragmented signals rather than making decisions, which creates demand for trusted operating systems.
source_snippet: Product leaders report rising synthesis overhead and slower decision cycles.
implication: ProductOS should lead with trusted synthesis and visible decision support rather than drafting alone.
unknowns: How much of the reported productivity gap is startup-specific versus enterprise-wide?
followup_questions: Which PM segments feel this burden most acutely?
